description_long: This is a light gray baseball cap with a structured, six-panel design and a gently curved brim. The front of the cap features a raised, stylized bird logo outlined in a slightly darker gray, adding a subtle decorative touch. The crown is rounded and slightly domed, with stitched ventilation eyelets on each panel for breathability. The back of the cap has an open section, likely for an adjustable strap, making it suitable for various head sizes. The fabric appears to be a soft, woven material, likely cotton or a cotton blend, giving the cap a matte finish. Overall, the cap is minimalist in design, with the logo as its only embellishment.
description: A light gray baseball cap with a curved brim and a raised, stylized bird logo on the front. The cap has a rounded crown, stitched eyelets, and an open back for adjustment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved brim and the prominent raised bird logo on the crown.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted fabric and the curvature of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back section, likely for an adjustable strap, and the rounded crown.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the cap and partial visibility of the front logo.
